arts.ttl: “Improved even more” – Ex-Netherlands man on what Liverpool’s Virgil van Dijk needs to do to cement status
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk signed a new deal with Liverpool some days ago, silencing any speculation about his future. The centre-back, who has played 44 times in all competitions this season, stated after his renewal that he was always thinking about playing for the Reds and had no doubts about where his future might lie. arts.ttl: How Liverpool can win Premier League title TODAY with Arsenal task crystal clear
arts.sum: Liverpool can be crowned Premier League champions on Sunday following their game with Leicester - but they first need the result to go their way when Arsenal face Ipswich

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Liverpool Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Leicester, languishing in 19th position, will host the league-leading Liverpool at the King Power Stadium on April 20, 2025, at 16:30 GMT, in what promises to be a stern test for the home side. Leice...

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool could be crowned Premier League champions with a win at Leicester City on Sunday. The Reds need a maximum of just six points from their remaining six games to win the title. Should Arsenal lose at Ipswich Town earlier in the day, Liverpool will win the Premier League with three points at Leicester. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool turn attention towards Premier League star to replace Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Liverpool are going to be busy this transfer window with some of their players expected to leave the club. arts.ttl: Conor Coady outlines what Leicester City players must do ahead of 'big summer'
arts.sum: But with City’s fate almost certain, the job of the players is try to put the club in a more positive place ahead of the summer, knowing that they can “never be in this situation again”. Leicester City have a “big summer” on the horizon and it’s the responsibility of the players to get the club in the best shape for it.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne to Liverpool transfer link as 'most realistic' Premier League move emerges

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.

arts.ttl: 'I'm a former Liverpool goalkeeper and world's best Alisson is greatest we've ever had'
arts.sum: Liverpool are on the verge of the Premier League title and former goalkeeper David James insists the world's best goalkeeper is a major reason why
